quote.text: Believe in yourself! Have faith in your abilities! Without a humble but reasonable confidence in your own powers you cannot be successful or happy.
quote.author: Norman Vincent Peale

history.text: Believe in yourself! Have faith in your abilities! Without a humble but reasonable confidence in your own powers you cannot be successful or happy.
history.author: Norman Vincent Peale

history.text: You'll get more from being a peacemaker than a warrior.
history.author: Arnold Schwarzenegger

history.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
history.author: Steve Jobs
